posts.author: dbouche1 (Deb Boucher)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anyone aware of an add on app to Monday that can do strategic portfolio management what-if scenario planning. I am looking for something that allows me to put in constraints (e.g. cost, schedule, resources) and be able to dynamically drag and drop projects to be able to optimize the plan based on constraints.

posts.author: Alexisdenisof (Alexis denisof)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, there are several add-ons for Monday.com that support strategic portfolio management and what-if scenario planning. Proggio and BigPicture integrate seamlessly with Monday.com, offering advanced features like resource management, timeline visualization, and dynamic drag-and-drop project management. Additionally, Wrike, though not a direct add-on, can sync with Monday.com and provides extensive scenario planning and portfolio management capabilities. Mavenlink and Smartsheet also offer robust resource optimization and scenario planning features. I recommend exploring these tools to see which best fits your needs. Many offer free trials or demos for testing.
